quiz.question:
Black has just pushed their pawn to c6.

Should we trade on c6 now? (dxc6) 

Or should we simply improve the rooks first and keep the pawn on d5?

answers.text:
Capturing on c6 allows the d-file to be open. So after ...Ne5+ Black would generate counterplay. 

We should simply recapture on e2 instead and double up the rooks.

feedback.text: Good job! Let's not unnecessarily give Black chances to create counterplay by capturing on c6.

distractors.text: We're up a pawn, so trading only benefits us. Black's counterplay isn't sufficient enough, and with the open d and e-files we'll be able to activate our rooks next.

feedback.text: By trading on c6, we allow Black to gain activity with ...Ne5+.
